description: Search for information about items, classes, quests, and other content from the Baldur's Gate 3 wiki at bg3.wiki

query.description: Search query for Baldur's Gate 3 content (e.g., 'Sword of Balduran', 'Fighter class', 'main quest', 'Astarion', 'Shadowheart')

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return
